description: Do something with a nearby object. Your perception shows what is near you and what each thing offers — a fridge might let you have a snack, a bed lets you sleep, a mirror lets you practice your speech. Pick the object and the interaction.

args.name: sim_id
args.description: PersistID of the interacting Sim (your own persist_id)

args.name: interaction_id
args.description: Interaction id from the object's interactions list
